rules.title: Application
rules.summaryEn: Rules in Part B Section I apply to vessels in any condition of visibility.
rules.summaryZh: B章第一节规则适用于任何能见度条件下的船舶。
rules.principle: Rules 4–10 are universally applicable regardless of visibility.

rules.title: Look-out
rules.summaryEn: Every vessel shall at all times maintain a proper look-out by sight and hearing.
rules.summaryZh: 每艘船舶在任何时候都应保持正规瞭望。
rules.principle: Constant vigilance is a foundational safety obligation.

rules.title: Safe Speed
rules.summaryEn: Every vessel shall at all times proceed at a safe speed.
rules.summaryZh: 每艘船舶在任何时候都应以安全速度行驶。
rules.principle: Safe speed allows effective evasive action within appropriate stopping distance.

rules.title: Risk of Collision
rules.summaryEn: Every vessel shall use all available means to determine if risk of collision exists.
rules.summaryZh: 每艘船舶应使用一切可用手段判断是否存在碰撞风险。
rules.principle: Risk of collision exists when bearing does not appreciably change.

rules.title: Action to Avoid Collision
rules.summaryEn: Any action taken to avoid collision shall be large enough to be readily apparent.
rules.summaryZh: 为避免碰撞所采取的行动应足够大，以便被对方船舶明显察觉。
rules.principle: Collision avoidance actions must be substantial, timely, and result in passing at a safe distance.

rules.title: Narrow Channels
rules.summaryEn: A vessel proceeding along the course of a narrow channel or fairway shall keep as near to the outer limit on the starboard side as is safe and practicable.
rules.summaryZh: 在狭水道或航道行驶的船舶，应尽量靠近右侧外缘航行。
rules.principle: Narrow channel rules require channel-specific context not available in open-water classification.

rules.title: Traffic Separation Schemes
rules.summaryEn: This rule applies to traffic separation schemes adopted by the Organization.
rules.summaryZh: 本规则适用于经组织批准的分道通航制。
rules.principle: Traffic separation rules require TSS chart data not modeled in current system.

rules.title: Application (Section II)
rules.summaryEn: Rules in Section II apply to vessels in sight of one another.
rules.summaryZh: 第二节规则适用于能互见的船舶。
rules.principle: Rules 11–18 govern vessels that can visually observe each other.

rules.title: Sailing Vessels
rules.summaryEn: When two sailing vessels are approaching one another, one of them shall keep out of the way.
rules.summaryZh: 两艘帆船相互接近时，其中一艘应避让另一艘。
rules.principle: Sailing vessel right-of-way requires vessel type context not modeled in current system.

rules.title: Overtaking
rules.summaryEn: Any vessel overtaking another shall keep out of the way of the vessel being overtaken.
rules.summaryZh: 追越船应避让被追越船。
rules.principle: The overtaking vessel is give-way; the overtaken vessel is stand-on regardless of subsequent developments.

rules.title: Head-on Situation
rules.summaryEn: When two power-driven vessels are meeting on reciprocal or nearly reciprocal courses so as to involve risk of collision, each shall alter her course to starboard.
rules.summaryZh: 两艘机动船在相反或接近相反的航向上相遇，有碰撞危险时，各自向右转向。
rules.principle: Both vessels are obligated to take mutual action by altering course to starboard.

rules.title: Crossing Situation
rules.summaryEn: When two power-driven vessels are crossing so as to involve risk of collision, the vessel which has the other on her own starboard side shall keep out of the way.
rules.summaryZh: 两艘机动船在有碰撞危险的横越态势中，目标在本船右舷一侧的船舶应避让。
rules.principle: The vessel with the other on her starboard side is give-way; the port-side vessel is stand-on.

rules.title: Action by Give-way Vessel
rules.summaryEn: Every vessel which is directed to keep out of the way of another vessel shall, so far as possible, take early and substantial action to keep well clear.
rules.summaryZh: 每艘被要求避让他船的船舶，应尽可能早地采取大幅行动，保持足够间距。
rules.principle: Give-way vessel must take early and substantial action to keep well clear.

rules.title: Action by Stand-on Vessel
rules.summaryEn: Where one of two vessels is to keep out of the way, the other shall keep her course and speed.
rules.summaryZh: 当两船中一艘需避让时，另一艘应保持航向和航速。
rules.principle: Stand-on vessel shall maintain course and speed; may take action only when collision cannot be avoided by give-way vessel alone.

rules.title: Responsibilities Between Vessels
rules.summaryEn: A power-driven vessel underway shall keep out of the way of a vessel not under command, restricted in ability to manoeuvre, engaged in fishing, or sailing.
rules.summaryZh: 正在航行的机动船应避让失控船、操纵受限船、从事捕鱼作业的船舶及帆船。
rules.principle: Hierarchy of responsibilities requires vessel type context not modeled in current system.

rules.title: Conduct of Vessels in Restricted Visibility
rules.summaryEn: Every vessel shall proceed at a safe speed adapted to the prevailing circumstances and conditions of restricted visibility.
rules.summaryZh: 每艘船舶在能见度受限条件下应以适应当前情况的安全速度行驶。
rules.principle: In restricted visibility, vessels must navigate with extreme caution and reduced speed.

maneuverActions.descriptionEn: Make a substantial alteration of course to starboard.
maneuverActions.descriptionZh: 向右舷做明显且足够的转向。
maneuverActions.rationale: Substantial starboard action keeps the give-way vessel well clear and makes intent visible to the other vessel.

maneuverActions.descriptionEn: Alter course to port as a last resort when collision cannot otherwise be avoided.
maneuverActions.descriptionZh: 在无法通过其他方式避免碰撞时，作为最后手段向左舷转向。
maneuverActions.rationale: Port alteration is generally discouraged; permitted only when starboard action is impossible.

maneuverActions.descriptionEn: Reduce speed substantially to increase time available for evasive action.
maneuverActions.descriptionZh: 大幅降低航速，为采取避碰行动争取更多时间。
maneuverActions.rationale: Reduced speed lowers closing rate and provides more time to assess and react.

maneuverActions.descriptionEn: Reduce speed to the minimum needed to maintain steerage way.
maneuverActions.descriptionZh: 将航速降至维持舵效所需的最低速度。
maneuverActions.rationale: Minimum steerage speed is required in restricted visibility or when situation is unclear.

maneuverActions.descriptionEn: Maintain current course and speed so the give-way vessel can predict own-ship behavior.
maneuverActions.descriptionZh: 保持当前航向和航速，使让路船能够预测本船动态。
maneuverActions.rationale: Stand-on vessel predictability is essential for the give-way vessel to take effective evasive action.

maneuverActions.descriptionEn: Increase vigilance and monitoring; do not yet alter course or speed.
maneuverActions.descriptionZh: 加强瞭望与监控；暂不改变航向或航速。
maneuverActions.rationale: Enhanced lookout allows early detection of changes in the other vessel's behavior.
